get.summary: Current user profile, preferences, roles, interests
Get a published deal by id
Published deals near a point, sorted by distance (cursor paginated)
Active online-only deals, newest first (cursor paginated)
Curated national student programs, newest first (cursor paginated)
Curated local deals within radius (default 15mi), nearest first
Recently-expired curated local deals (last 7 days), most-recent first — never redeemable
Enriched-place feed sections for a region (cheap eats, hidden gems, etc.) — read-only, no live AI. Pass region, or lat+lng to resolve the nearest region automatically.

Map-ready place markers near a point: bounded (default ~40), with markerKind + keyless primaryPhotoUrl. Read-only, no live AI or photo fetching. Pass lat+lng (resolves region), optional radiusMiles, optional limit.

post.summary: Cheap Food Run: the single best place to eat right now for an intent (under_10, study_spot, etc.) with estimated cost, reason, budget tip, and an optional matched restaurant deal. Read-only over stored Places — no live AI.

Generate a Smart Basket: budget-fit student staples, matched real grocery deals, best store + optional second stop, estimated total, and an honest explanation. Works without auth and out-of-area (lower confidence + estimated labels).
Re-roll a Smart Basket from its saved parameters (returns a new basket)

get.summary: Fetch a previously generated Smart Basket by id

post.summary: Record a swipe (right saves). Supports Idempotency-Key.

delete.summary: Undo the latest swipe for this deal

post.summary: Record an impression (deduped per day). No precise coordinates.
Record a deal open (detail view) with optional signals
Mark used — counts realized savings once per user+deal

get.summary: The current user's saved deals (most recent first)

post.summary: Record a client analytics event (distinctId = current user)
Verify a StoreKit transaction and refresh entitlements
App Store Server Notifications v2 webhook
Grant a role to a user (audited)

get.summary: Density-first coverage report: verified inventory, zone readiness, provider health

info.title: Dealy API
info.description: Dealy production API — swipe-first, location-aware deals.

region.description: Region slug; resolved from lat/lng when omitted

intent.description: Legacy alias for `goal`; used only when `goal` is omitted

region.description: Region slug; resolved from lat/lng when omitted

distanceMiles.description: Distance to the deal at impression time (miles).

freshnessDays.description: Deal freshness in days at impression time.
